_comment: Legacy reference snippet (moved from repo root to keep the root skills-focused).
Suggested preCompact hook — merge into the project's .github/hooks.json (or
~/.github/hooks.json for all projects). Cursor requires top-level "version": 1.
Backs up the transcript to <project>/.github/backups/ with a timestamp.
Cursor's preCompact is observational only — it cannot inject preserve-instructions
into compaction (unlike Claude Code additionalContext). Model-side handoff triggers
remain the real guarantee; this hook is a transcript backstop + user nudge.
Adjust the python path/command for your machine after merging.
Dropped Claude-only matchers auto/manual; Cursor fires preCompact once per compaction.
